title: Sold out
question: 把今天课文里“票卖完 -> 有人退票 -> 结果日期或场次不对”的转折放进电影票、演出票或活动预约的小场景。这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: The tickets were sold out. Then someone returned two tickets. I hurried to buy them, but they were for next Wednesday's performance. I might as well choose another day.
word_bank: I might as well choose another day
I might as well have them

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 没有票了：你想买今晚的票，但页面或窗口显示票已售完

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 突然有希望：有人退回了两张票，你马上去抢
options.english_template: Then someone ___. I hurried to buy them at once.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 结果不对：这两张票不是今晚的，而是下周三那一场
